tldr.bestFor: Readers researching Sora's shutdown, export guidance, API sunset timing, and active alternatives after the web and app experience was discontinued
tldr.notFor: Buyers building a fresh active shortlist; Sora should now be treated as a historical benchmark rather than a selectable production tool
tldr.why: OpenAI discontinued the Sora web and app experiences on April 26, 2026, and says the Sora API will be discontinued on September 24, 2026. Keep this page for status context and replacement routing, not as a normal buying recommendation.

miniTest.prompt: Generate a 10-15 second product teaser with one clear subject, one camera move, one environmental detail, synced sound, and one clean ending frame. Keep the scene realistic and avoid on-screen text.

checklist.label: Goal
checklist.value: Text-to-video concept footage / prototype creative / cinematic teaser

checklist.label: Access model
checklist.value: Confirm whether you need historical Sora context or an active replacement tool

checklist.label: Prompt adherence
checklist.value: Check whether the subject, action, sound, and ending frame all match the brief

checklist.label: Motion realism
checklist.value: Check whether movement feels smooth and physically believable

checklist.label: Scene coherence
checklist.value: Check whether lighting, camera movement, and subject consistency hold through the full clip

checklist.label: Style range
checklist.value: Check whether the output can move cleanly between photorealistic, cinematic, animated, or surreal treatments

checklist.label: Cost posture
checklist.value: Do not treat legacy Sora pricing as a current plan path; move to alternatives for active choices

miniTest.verdict: Result: use Sora only as a historical quality benchmark and shutdown reference. For current production, compare alternatives such as Runway, Pika, InVideo, or other active text-to-video tools.

useCases.title: Historical model benchmark
useCases.why: Sora remains useful as a historical benchmark for realism and model-led generation, but it should not be treated as an active product shortlist pick.

useCases.title: Replacement shortlist
useCases.why: Use active alternatives when the work still requires text-to-video generation, cinematic prototyping, or publishable creative output after Sora's shutdown.

useCases.title: Export and API sunset check
useCases.why: OpenAI advises users to export Sora content as soon as possible, and the API is scheduled to be discontinued on September 24, 2026.

keyFeatures: Historical prompt-to-video and image-to-video generation from the former Sora app experience
Style range that explicitly spans cinematic, animated, photorealistic, and surreal outputs
Automatic inclusion of music, sound effects, and dialogue in generated scenes
Characters workflow for casting yourself or teammates in videos with explicit usage control
Shutdown status: web and app discontinued on April 26, 2026, with API discontinuation scheduled for September 24, 2026

pros: Still useful as a historical benchmark for text-to-video quality
Clear shutdown dates are now available from OpenAI Help Center
Useful as a routing page for Sora users who need active replacements
Preserves context for comparisons against current cinematic generation tools
cons: The Sora web and app experiences have been discontinued
The Sora API is scheduled to be discontinued on September 24, 2026
Legacy pricing should not be treated as a current buying path
Teams need active alternatives for new production work

verdict.bottomLine: Sora is now a discontinued historical reference, not a current production choice. Use this page to understand the shutdown timeline and move into alternatives for active production tools.

faqs.question: Who is Sora best for?
faqs.answer: Sora is now best treated as a historical reference for readers checking the shutdown timeline, export guidance, API sunset timing, and replacement options.

faqs.question: Is Sora still an active web or app product?
faqs.answer: No. OpenAI Help Center says the Sora web and app experiences were discontinued on April 26, 2026.

faqs.question: What is the Sora API sunset date?
faqs.answer: OpenAI Help Center says the Sora API will be discontinued on September 24, 2026.

faqs.question: What should existing Sora users do?
faqs.answer: OpenAI recommends exporting Sora content as soon as possible. Use the official Help Center article for the current export path and support details.

faqs.question: How does Sora differ from Runway?
faqs.answer: The comparison is now historical. Runway remains an active studio-style generation workflow, while Sora is a discontinued benchmark and replacement-intent page.

faqs.question: When should a buyer skip Sora?
faqs.answer: Skip Sora for any new active buying decision. Use alternatives if you need a current text-to-video or cinematic generation workflow.
